name: Recent Install - Already Submitted for This Issue
description: Recent-install caller who already submitted a claim for the same problem.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: My battery's been acting up since the install and I already submitted a claim for it - what now?
expectedOutcome: Agent recognizes an existing submission, avoids pushing a duplicate, advises monitoring email for the claim number/follow-up and replying to the warranty team's email, or transfers if appropriate.
